## Summary

- What changed?
- Why is it needed?

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm evals`
- [ ] README/docs updated if setup, env vars, routes, or workflow boundaries changed
- [ ] No secrets, customer data, inbox credentials, passcodes, private URLs, or database dumps committed

## Notes

Anything reviewers should know about setup, tradeoffs, workflow behavior, or follow-up work.
